content:
📜 2. Chaos Event Timing Reassessment – Finding the Right Week

📜 Instead of automatically placing the Chaos Event at Week 8, we will reassess its placement based on the revised macro schedule.

✔ New Approach:
• The Chaos Event will be placed where the narrative structure demands it.
• We will analyze where thematic movements suggest a disruption moment.
• Once the revised macro is presented, we will assign the event accordingly.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Aligns with literary and historical themes instead of arbitrary timing.
✔ Ensures Chaos is thematically relevant rather than forced.

📜 3. Next Steps – Gathering Macro Schedule Data for Adjustments

🚀 The next immediate step is to review the macro schedule and determine:
